params.reason: Articles of Chapter 66, including parts of umbrellas or walking-sticks, are excluded from the current section/chapter

conditions.value: handles or parts of carving or moulding materials

articles of Chapter 93 (arms and parts thereof) are excluded

works of art, collectors' pieces or antiques of Chapter 97 are excluded from the current section/chapter
